title: The Closed-Form Solution of h[n]
summary: This page derives a closed-form expression for the impulse response h[n] of a discrete-time LTI system as the sum of an impulse term and characteristic-mode terms. It shows how A₀ is found as b_N/a_N, leading to h[n] = (b_N/a_N)δ[n] + y_c[n]u[n], and introduces Example 3.18 on determining the impulse response for a specific second-order system.
